questions.question: How many width-mismatch (WIDTH) lint warnings will Verilator emit for sync_fifo.sv, a synchronous FIFO whose status logic compares the occupancy counter against the DEPTH parameter and the constant 0?

How many distinct latches will Verilator infer in sync_fifo.sv, a fully synchronous FIFO built from two always_ff blocks (write and read pointers) with all outputs driven by continuous assigns and no always_comb blocks?
How many blocking-assignment-inside-always_ff hazards will Verilator flag in sync_fifo.sv?
